content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom N:15 in the molecule. Looking at the image, I can definitively identify the neighbor atoms connected to N:15:

- N:15 (blue sphere) is covalently bonded to:
  1. C:14 (carbon, yellow/gold sphere) - connected by a blue bond
  2. C:17 (carbon, yellow/gold sphere) - connected by a blue bond (part of the ring structure)
  3. O:16 (oxygen, red sphere) - connected by a blue/red bond

All three connections are clearly visible as covalent bonds in the molecular structure.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 8889, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_8889.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 15 (N) are:
- Atom index 14, element C (carbon)
- Atom index 17, element C (carbon)  
- Atom index 16, element O (oxygen)

Geomconf_index: 8889

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 15, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
